title: Epitaph
content:
BY THE SAME (DR. DELANY)

    Hoc tumulata jacet proles Lenaea sepulchro,
    Immortale genus, nee peritura jacet;
    Quin oritura iterum, matris concreditur alvo:
    Bis natum referunt te quoque, Bacche Pater.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Jonathan Swift delivers a powerful performance in "Epitaph"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
